bead.title: Emit raw-transcript-viewed audit events on transcript access
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Prompt, response, and stderr access is more sensitive than a generic run-detail page load, so Story 16 needs a separate audit event when raw transcript fields are actually resolved.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go:30-31 defines run_detail_view and raw_transcript_viewed event kinds.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go:65-90 resolves run(id:) and is the only place with both project-scoped visibility and field-selection context.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go:152-180 detects prompt, response, and stderr selections.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go:182-227 appends the raw_transcript_viewed event and must dedupe per run id.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md:1216-1237 documents the adjacent run-detail audit event; this child adds the stricter transcript-access behavior without changing auth.
- Parent context: ddx-b4c5151a, originally split from ddx-70a432b5. Preserve dependency IDs ddx-f04faa86 and ddx-4cd64068 when filing this child.

PROPOSED FIX
Emit a raw_transcript_viewed bead audit event only when run(id:) resolves prompt, response, or stderr for a project-visible run. The event body must include project_id, run_id, selected fields, and visibility=project_membership; actor/source must follow the existing run_detail_view identity behavior; repeat transcript queries for the same run must not append duplicate raw transcript events.

NON-SCOPE
- Frontend implementation; Story 16.1 and Story 16.2 own the production page and evidence tab.
- New auth or role-based access control beyond existing project-scoped run visibility.
- Generic run_detail_view behavior except as needed to coexist with raw_transcript_viewed.
- Resolver bundle/tool-call implementation and Playwright e2e coverage assigned to sibling child beads.
- Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed passes and proves a header-only run(id:) query does not emit raw_transcript_viewed.
2. TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed proves a prompt/response/stderr run(id:) query emits exactly one raw_transcript_viewed event with run_id, fields=prompt,response,stderr, and visibility=project_membership.
3. Extend TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed, or add TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed_DedupesPerRun, to prove repeated transcript access for the same run does not append duplicate raw_transcript_viewed events.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/graphql/... -run 'TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed|TestAuditEvent_RawTranscriptViewed_DedupesPerRun' passes.
5. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
